zh.Of Rumst,, Anvers, Belgium: 比利時安特維爾盧姆斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Count Philippe II von Vianden於1265年出生在盧森堡維安德時，他的父親Philipp I. von Vianden40歲，母親Marie van Brabant-Perwijs28歲。他和Marie de CERNAY至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1308年在他的家鄉享年43歲。

zh-hans.Of Rumst,, Anvers, Belgium: 比利时安特維爾盧姆斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Count Philippe II von Vianden于1265年出生在卢森堡維安德时，他的父亲Philipp I. von Vianden40岁，母亲Marie van Brabant-Perwijs28岁。他和Marie de CERNAY至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1308年在他的家乡享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Philippe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Philip
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Count Philippe II von Vianden was born in 1265, in Vianden, Luxembourg, his father, Philipp I. von Vianden, was 40 and his mother, Marie van Brabant-Perwijs, was 28. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Marie de CERNAY. He died in 1308, in his hometown, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Count Philippe II von Vianden est né en 1265, à Vianden, Luxembourg, son père, Philipp I. von Vianden, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Marie van Brabant-Perwijs, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Marie de CERNAY. Il est décédé en 1308, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Count Philippe II von Vianden 1265 in Vianden, Luxemburg geboren wurde, war sein Vater Philipp I. von Vianden 40 und seine Mutter Marie van Brabant-Perwijs 28. Er hatte mit Marie de CERNAY mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1308 im Alter von 43 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Count Philippe II von Vianden è nato il nel 1265 nel Vianden, Lussemburgo, il suo padre, Philipp I. von Vianden, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Marie van Brabant-Perwijs, aveva 28 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Marie de CERNAY. Morì nel 1308, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.Vianden, Luxemburg: ルクセンブルクヴィアンデン
ja.Of Rumst,, Anvers, Belgium: ベルギーアントウエルペンルムスト
ja.Vianden, Vianden, Luxembourg: ルクセンブルクヴィアンデンヴィアンデン
ja.lifeSummary: Count Philippe II von Viandenが1265年にルクセンブルクヴィアンデンで生まれた時，父Philipp I. von Viandenは40歳，母Marie van Brabant-Perwijsは28歳であった。彼はMarie de CERNAYとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1308年に故郷で43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Count Philippe II von Vianden(이)가 1265년 룩셈부르크 비누든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Philipp I. von Vianden(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Marie van Brabant-Perwijs(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Marie de CERNAY(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1308년 그의 고향에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Count Philippe II von Vianden nasceu em 1265, em Vianden, Luxemburgo, seu pai, Philipp I. von Vianden, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Marie van Brabant-Perwijs, tinha 28 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Marie de CERNAY. Ele faleceu em 1308, em sua cidade natal, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Count Philippe II von Vianden родился в 1265 г. в местности вянден, Люксембург, его отцу по имени Philipp I. von Vianden было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie van Brabant-Perwijs, 28. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Marie de CERNAY. Он умер в 1308 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Count Philippe II von Vianden nació en 1265, en Vianden, Luxemburgo, su papá, Philipp I. von Vianden, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Marie van Brabant-Perwijs, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Marie de CERNAY. Murió en 1308, en su pueblo, a la edad de 43 años.
